name: align
description: Single-plugin marketplace for /align — install via /plugin marketplace add ggrigo/align then /plugin install align@align.

plugins.name: align
plugins.description: Personal evals for Claude Code: capture the corrections you'd otherwise mutter and forget. Rate LLM claims (correct/wrong/almost/needs-nuance/can't-verify/skipped) in a local HTML form, archive as machine-readable markdown, feed patterns back into prompts and CLAUDE.md.
